tc-01.replacement_table:
ACDOCA (Universal Journal) Use CDS view I_JournalEntry for read access I_JournalEntryItem table_to_acdoca Read via ACDOCA / I_JournalEntryItem; RBUKRS, RACCT, BUZEI->DOCLN, add RLDNR='0L'. ACDOCA (Universal Journal) Use CDS view I_JournalEntry for read access I_JournalEntryItem table_to_acdoca Read via ACDOCA / I_JournalEntryItem; RBUKRS, RACCT, BUZEI->DOCLN, add RLDNR='0L'. ACDOCA (Universal Journal) Use CDS view I_JournalEntry for read access I_JournalEntryItem table_to_acdoca Read via ACDOCA / I_JournalEntryItem; RBUKRS, RACCT, BUZEI->DOCLN, add RLDNR='0L'. DATA: lt_bseg TYPE TABLE OF ACDOCA,
      ls_bseg TYPE ACDOCA.

SELECT * FROM ACDOCA
  INTO TABLE lt_bseg
  WHERE RBUKRS = '1000'
    AND RLDNR = '0L'
    AND gjahr = '2023'
    AND belnr = '0100000123'.

LOOP AT lt_bseg INTO ls_bseg.
  WRITE: / ls_bseg-RACCT, ls_bseg-dmbtr, ls_bseg-DOCLN.
ENDLOOP.

tc-02.replacement_table:
PRCD_ELEMENTS (New pricing conditions table in S/4HANA 1909+) None table_swap Replace table KONV -> PRCD_ELEMENTS (transparent, same fields). PRCD_ELEMENTS (New pricing conditions table in S/4HANA 1909+) None table_swap Replace table KONV -> PRCD_ELEMENTS (transparent, same fields). PRCD_ELEMENTS (New pricing conditions table in S/4HANA 1909+) None table_swap Replace table KONV -> PRCD_ELEMENTS (transparent, same fields). DATA: lt_konv TYPE TABLE OF PRCD_ELEMENTS,
      ls_konv TYPE PRCD_ELEMENTS.

SELECT * FROM PRCD_ELEMENTS
  INTO TABLE lt_konv
  WHERE knumv = lv_knumv
    AND kposn = '000010'.

LOOP AT lt_konv INTO ls_konv.
  WRITE: / ls_konv-kschl, ls_konv-kbetr, ls_konv-waers.
ENDLOOP.

tc-03.replacement_table:
CDPOS_STR / CDPOS_UID (Cluster abolished; now transparent tables) None table_swap Cluster abolished; read CDPOS_STR / CDPOS_UID. Verify on target release. CDPOS_STR / CDPOS_UID (Cluster abolished; now transparent tables) None table_swap Cluster abolished; read CDPOS_STR / CDPOS_UID. Verify on target release. CDPOS_STR / CDPOS_UID (Cluster abolished; now transparent tables) None table_swap Cluster abolished; read CDPOS_STR / CDPOS_UID. Verify on target release. VBAK (still exists) Some fields changed or moved Check SD simplification items I_SalesOrder restructured_verify Still exists; status fields from former VBUK folded in. DATA: lt_cdpos TYPE TABLE OF CDPOS_STR,
      ls_cdpos TYPE CDPOS_STR.

SELECT * FROM CDPOS_STR
  INTO TABLE lt_cdpos
  WHERE objectid = lv_objectid
    AND tabname  = 'VBAK'.

LOOP AT lt_cdpos INTO ls_cdpos.
  WRITE: / ls_cdpos-fname, ls_cdpos-value_new, ls_cdpos-value_old.
ENDLOOP.

tc-04.replacement_table:
ACDOCA (Universal Journal) Direct cluster access not possible I_JournalEntryItem blocker_no_replacement Physical FI cluster container for BSEG; data now in ACDOCA Universal Journal. ACDOCA (Universal Journal) Direct cluster access not possible I_JournalEntryItem blocker_no_replacement Physical FI cluster container for BSEG; data now in ACDOCA Universal Journal. DATA: lt_rfblg TYPE TABLE OF rfblg.

SELECT * FROM rfblg
  INTO TABLE lt_rfblg
  WHERE mandt = sy-mandt
    AND bukrs = '1000'.

tc-05.replacement_table:
Transparent tables per cluster ID Refer to SAP Note 2409530 None blocker_no_replacement HR cluster -> transparent per infotype (Note 2409530). Transparent tables per cluster ID Refer to SAP Note 2409530 None blocker_no_replacement HR cluster -> transparent per infotype (Note 2409530). DATA: lt_pcl2 TYPE TABLE OF pcl2.

SELECT * FROM pcl2
  INTO TABLE lt_pcl2
  WHERE relid = 'RU'
    AND pernr = lv_pernr.

tc-06.replacement_table:
MSEG (still exists) New fields added; some fields renamed Join with MKPF for header data I_MaterialDocumentItem restructured_verify Still readable; new data model MATDOC; prefer released CDS. MSEG (still exists) New fields added; some fields renamed Join with MKPF for header data I_MaterialDocumentItem restructured_verify Still readable; new data model MATDOC; prefer released CDS. MSEG (still exists) New fields added; some fields renamed Join with MKPF for header data I_MaterialDocumentItem restructured_verify Still readable; new data model MATDOC; prefer released CDS. MKPF (still exists) Verify field changes via SE11 I_MaterialDocumentHeader restructured_verify Still readable; header data in MATDOC; prefer released CDS. DATA: lt_mseg TYPE TABLE OF mseg,
      ls_mseg TYPE mseg.

SELECT m~mblnr m~zeile m~matnr m~werks
       m~menge m~meins m~bwart
  FROM mseg AS m
  INNER JOIN mkpf AS k ON k~mblnr = m~mblnr
                      AND k~mjahr = m~mjahr
  INTO TABLE lt_mseg
  WHERE m~werks = '1000'
    AND m~bwart IN ('101', '261').

tc-07.replacement_table:
VBAK (still exists) Some fields changed or moved Check SD simplification items I_SalesOrder restructured_verify Still exists; status fields from former VBUK folded in. VBAK (still exists) Some fields changed or moved Check SD simplification items I_SalesOrder restructured_verify Still exists; status fields from former VBUK folded in. VBAK (still exists) Some fields changed or moved Check SD simplification items I_SalesOrder restructured_verify Still exists; status fields from former VBUK folded in. DATA: lt_vbak TYPE TABLE OF vbak,
      ls_vbak TYPE vbak.

SELECT vbeln erdat auart kunnr netwr waerk
  FROM vbak
  INTO TABLE lt_vbak
  WHERE erdat >= '20230101'
    AND auart = 'ZOR'.

tc-08.replacement_table:
Embedded Analytics / CDS views SAP Note 2267463 None blocker_no_replacement LIS abolished; use Embedded Analytics / CDS (Note 2267463). Embedded Analytics / CDS views SAP Note 2267463 None blocker_no_replacement LIS abolished; use Embedded Analytics / CDS (Note 2267463). DATA: lt_s001 TYPE TABLE OF s001.

SELECT * FROM s001
  INTO TABLE lt_s001
  WHERE mandt = sy-mandt
    AND spmon >= '202301'.

tc-09.replacement_table:
ACDOCA (Universal Journal) Use CDS view I_JournalEntry for read access I_JournalEntryItem table_to_acdoca Read via ACDOCA / I_JournalEntryItem; RBUKRS, RACCT, BUZEI->DOCLN, add RLDNR='0L'. ACDOCA (Universal Journal) Use CDS view I_JournalEntry for read access I_JournalEntryItem table_to_acdoca Read via ACDOCA / I_JournalEntryItem; RBUKRS, RACCT, BUZEI->DOCLN, add RLDNR='0L'. DATA: ls_bseg TYPE ACDOCA.

SELECT SINGLE RACCT DOCLN dmbtr shkzg
  FROM ACDOCA
  INTO (ls_bseg-RACCT, ls_bseg-DOCLN,
        ls_bseg-dmbtr, ls_bseg-shkzg)
  WHERE RBUKRS = lv_bukrs
    AND RLDNR = '0L'
    AND belnr = lv_belnr
    AND gjahr = lv_gjahr
    AND DOCLN = lv_buzei.

tc-10.replacement_table:
PRCD_ELEMENTS (New pricing conditions table in S/4HANA 1909+) None table_swap Replace table KONV -> PRCD_ELEMENTS (transparent, same fields). PRCD_ELEMENTS (New pricing conditions table in S/4HANA 1909+) None table_swap Replace table KONV -> PRCD_ELEMENTS (transparent, same fields). PRCD_ELEMENTS (New pricing conditions table in S/4HANA 1909+) None table_swap Replace table KONV -> PRCD_ELEMENTS (transparent, same fields). DATA: lt_konv TYPE TABLE OF PRCD_ELEMENTS,
      ls_konv TYPE PRCD_ELEMENTS.

SELECT knumv kposn kschl kwert kbetr waers
  FROM PRCD_ELEMENTS
  INTO TABLE lt_konv
  WHERE knumv = lv_knumv.

LOOP AT lt_konv INTO ls_konv
  WHERE kschl = 'PR00' OR kschl = 'MWST'.
  lv_total = lv_total + ls_konv-kwert.
ENDLOOP.

tc-11.replacement_table:
CDHDR (still exists but cluster abolished) Verify with SE11 on target system None restructured_verify Restructured; verify field set via SE11 on target. CDPOS_STR / CDPOS_UID (Cluster abolished; now transparent tables) None table_swap Cluster abolished; read CDPOS_STR / CDPOS_UID. Verify on target release. SELECT h~changenr h~objectid h~udate h~utime
         p~tabname p~fname p~value_new p~value_old
  FROM cdhdr AS h
  INNER JOIN CDPOS_STR AS p ON p~changenr = h~changenr
  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_changes)
  WHERE h~objectclas = 'VERKBELEG'
    AND h~objectid   = lv_vbeln.

tc-12.replacement_table:
ACDOCA (Universal Journal) Use CDS view I_JournalEntry for read access I_JournalEntryItem table_to_acdoca Read via ACDOCA / I_JournalEntryItem; RBUKRS, RACCT, BUZEI->DOCLN, add RLDNR='0L'. SELECT RACCT kostl SUM( dmbtr ) AS total_amount
  FROM ACDOCA
  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_balances)
  WHERE RBUKRS = '1000'
    AND RLDNR = '0L'
    AND gjahr = '2023'
    AND POPER IN ('01', '02', '03')
  GROUP BY RACCT kostl.
